title: Crispy Coconut Shrimp Algerian-Style
description: Delicious crispy coconut shrimp dish with an Algerian twist, perfect for a satisfying snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Algerian spices
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a mix of cumin, paprika, and coriander

instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, Algerian spices, salt, and pepper.
2. In a separate dish, beat the egg.
3. In a third dish, place the coconut flakes.
4. Dip each shrimp into the flour mixture, coating both sides, then into the beaten egg, and finally into the coconut flakes, pressing gently to adhere.
5. Heat about 1/2-inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. When the oil is hot, add a few of the coated shrimp to the skillet (do not overcrowd).
7. Fry the shrimp until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Remove the shrimp from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Repeat the frying process with the remaining shrimp.
10. Serve the crispy coconut shrimp hot and enjoy!
